articles.summary: Eric Swalwell is resigning from Congress after multiple women accused him of sexual assault and misconduct. And, Trump is feuding with Pope Leo, calling him weak on crime for opposing the war.

articles.title: Ukraine hopes for more cooperation after Hungary elects new prime minister

articles.summary: With shipments through the Strait of Hormuz stalled after the Iran war began, fertilizer shortages are deepening across India.

articles.title: U.K. inquiry lays bare 'catastrophic' missed chances before stabbings at dance class
